data.body: Epic 2 UX second-pass critique + refinements applied. Inversion confirmed (verdict-first, finding-centric, ~1-click provenance). Applied: sticky jump-linked gate strip with magnitude counts; FIXED section order (plan->completion->code); convergence viz right-sized (stacked small-multiple bars <=3 rounds, blocking-forward line graph >=4) + SR data table; native <details>/<summary> collapsibles + h2/h3 outline; finding rows have chevron, completion criterion rows do not; one-decimal scores; human pass labels; norm_id demoted; certified badge. KEY DECISION: replaced the green/red delta-from-threshold (semantic trap: green blocking findings on a failed review read as healthy) with a NEUTRAL THRESHOLD METER (bar fills to priority, tick = block_threshold, fill color inherits the DECISION color). Story G ff6f rewritten to this final design. Epic 2 UX now settled; ready to run the plan-review gate on all 9 tickets.
